subcodes.first_line: O ye two faithful friends! Ever have ye been, and still are, before Mine eyes. Never have ye been forgotten, nor shall ye ever be forgotten [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو یار وفادار همیشه در نظر بوده و هستید ابدا فراموش نشده و نخواهید شد اگر
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @firmness in the Covenant, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
